mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, equipment_id, event_code, archive_code, event_date, reporter, event_type, event_level, event_description, handling_measures, handling_result, remark, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, delete_by, delete_time
mapper.update: update equipment_adverse_event set event_code = #{eventCode}, archive_code = #{archiveCode}, event_date = #{eventDate}, reporter = #{reporter}, event_type = #{eventType}, event_level = #{eventLevel}, event_description = #{eventDescription}, handling_measures = #{handlingMeasures}, handling_result = #{handlingResult}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id} and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and del_flag = '0'

update equipment_adverse_event set del_flag = '1', delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = now(), update_by = #{deleteBy}, update_time = now() where tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId} and del_flag = '0' and equipment_id in
#{eid}
